name: code-interpreter
description: Secure sandboxed environment for executing Python and JavaScript code with Docker isolation and fallback mode
trait: Use code_create_session to start a sandboxed Python or Node.js session, code_execute to run code and get stdout/stderr, code_upload_file to add files to the workspace, code_install_package to add dependencies, and code_end_session to clean up. Ideal for running computations, data analysis, or testing code snippets securely.
